description: Grandfathered source files above their surface's nonblank-LOC cap (frontend: src/**.{ts,vue}; rust: src-tauri/**/src/**.rs — higher cap because unit tests live inline). Entries may shrink but not grow; new files above the cap are rejected. Regenerate with `npm run check:loc -- --update`.

src-tauri/core/src/tasks.rs.reason: Grew past the cap in the task-management increments (PR #46), in parallel with this gate landing on main. Bugfix regression tests (Codex PR #46 rounds) account for the growth past 1225; half is the inline #[cfg(test)] module. Round 2 (1431->1481): the strip_scalar_tags_comment discriminator + its doc comment + two regression tests for the leading-# tag list bug. Shrink only; split (parse/writer/list seams) when next touched.
